publishedAbstract: - Openshift GUI shows 'Object service degraded' alert and the following events appear in the `openshift-storage` namespace: ~~~ 1h2m Warning FailedGetResourceMetric horizontalpodautoscaler/noobaa-endpoint failed to get cpu utilization: unable to get metrics for resource cpu: no metrics returned from resource metrics API 1h2m Warning FailedComputeMetricsReplicas horizontalpodautoscaler/noobaa-endpoint invalid metrics (1 invalid out of 1), first error is: failed to get cpu utilization: unable to get metrics for resource cpu: no metrics returned from resource metrics API ~~~
publishedTitle: horizontalpodautoscaler/noobaa-endpoint  failed to get cpu utilization alert
